description: SQL error taxonomy for self-correction agent

categories.name: Syntax Error
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL has a syntax error. Identify the exact location and fix the syntax.

mysql: You have an error in your SQL syntax

categories.name: Missing Table
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL references a table that does not exist. Check the table name and correct it.

duckdb: Table with name .+ does not exist

categories.name: Missing Column
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL references a column that does not exist. Check the column name and correct it.

categories.name: Ambiguous Column Reference
categories.prompt_hint: The column reference is ambiguous. Qualify the column with its table name.

categories.name: Type Mismatch
categories.prompt_hint: There is a type mismatch in the SQL. Add an appropriate CAST or fix the data type.

categories.name: Division by Zero
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL may divide by zero. Add a NULLIF or CASE guard to handle zero denominators.

categories.name: Missing Join Condition
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL is missing a JOIN condition. Add the ON clause to relate the joined tables.

duckdb: Referenced table .+ not found in FROM clause

categories.name: Aggregation Error
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL has an aggregation error. Ensure all non-aggregated columns are in the GROUP BY clause.

postgres: must appear in the GROUP BY clause
duckdb: must appear in the GROUP BY clause

categories.name: Subquery Returns Multiple Rows
categories.prompt_hint: The subquery returns more than one row where a scalar is expected. Add LIMIT 1 or use an aggregate function.

postgres: more than one row returned by a subquery
duckdb: More than one row returned by a subquery

categories.name: Invalid Date Format
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL contains an invalid date format. Use the correct date literal format (YYYY-MM-DD).

postgres: invalid input syntax for type date
date/time field value out of range
duckdb: date field value out of range
Could not convert string .+ to DATE

categories.name: Null Comparison Error
categories.prompt_hint: The SQL compares a value to NULL incorrectly. Use IS NULL or IS NOT NULL instead of = NULL.

categories.name: LIKE Pattern Error
categories.prompt_hint: The LIKE pattern is invalid. Check the pattern syntax and escape characters.

postgres: LIKE pattern must not end with escape character
duckdb: LIKE expression must be a string

categories.name: Column Alias Used in WHERE
categories.prompt_hint: A column alias cannot be used in the WHERE clause. Wrap the query in a subquery or repeat the expression.

categories.name: Window Function Error
categories.prompt_hint: The window function is used incorrectly. Ensure the OVER clause is present and properly formed.

postgres: window function .+ requires an OVER clause
aggregate function calls cannot be nested

categories.name: CTE Reference Error
categories.prompt_hint: The CTE reference is invalid. Ensure the CTE is defined before it is referenced.

postgres: recursive reference to query .+ is not allowed

categories.name: Permission Denied
categories.prompt_hint: The database user does not have permission to execute this query. Contact the database administrator.

sqlite: attempt to write a readonly database

categories.name: Connection Error
categories.prompt_hint: The database connection failed. The query will be retried automatically.

categories.name: Query Timeout
categories.prompt_hint: The query timed out. The query will be retried automatically.

postgres: canceling statement due to statement timeout

categories.name: Result Too Large
categories.prompt_hint: The query result is too large. Add a LIMIT clause to reduce the result set size.

mysql: Result consisted of more than max_allowed_packet

categories.name: Unknown Error
categories.prompt_hint: The error type is unknown. Analyze the error message carefully and attempt a general fix.
